clickup.reason: Not used in this project. Enable with: node adapters/install.js --enable clickup

bitbucket.reason: Not used in this project. Enable with: node adapters/install.js --enable bitbucket

supabase.reason: Enable if the project is backed by Supabase. Requires SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF and SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN env vars.

vercel.reason: Enable if the project deploys to Vercel. Requires VERCEL_TOKEN env var.

railway.reason: Enable if the project deploys to Railway. Requires RAILWAY_TOKEN env var.

playwright.reason: Enable for E2E checks during validation. No env vars required.

codescene.reason: OPTIONAL. Enable only if you have a CodeScene Cloud account and want advisory code-health scoring. Requires CS_ACCESS_TOKEN. See adapters/codescene/steering/data-boundaries.md before enabling.
